title: Cobblemon: Legends Untold
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b32021634f791f6c30d51e806bb0a2aaef5b73d.png)

This datapack/mod adds 8 Legendary, & 1 Mythical Pokémon, 5 structures, & 7 new items to cobblemon.

**_If you are using the datapack version please put the file in both your resource pack folder and the datapack folder. You may need to relocate some structures when updating your world._**

This has not been tested on servers, use at your own risk.

[![Uses TSFlareon's Item Core to supply items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70029f82406f0a5401aa1f33af338e469daae046.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tsfitemcore)

New Legendary (And Mythical) Pokémon & How to get them:

- Rayquaza
![Rayquaza in the Sky Pillar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a605c0dcdb1d4b2d362f6cbcfb0fd38ba8725fa2.png)

Rayquaza is found in the Sky Pillar, a new rare structure that you can find in mountian biomes. Bringing a Jade Orb to the top of Sky Pillar will spawn in a level 70 Rayquaza. Rarely in some structures you will find a Jade Orb or a Jade Map, a map that leads you directly to Sky Pillar. Every player on the server will get only one chance to catch Rayquaza.

- Mewtwo
![Mewtwo being grown in a lab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6583a4a856f4352db052e028d5455c0518e83c.png)

Rarely in Legendary Structures like Sky Pillar you will find a new item called Mew DNA, using this & a nether star or a comet shard you can create Mewtwo in a Resurrection Machine.

- Mew
![Mew in the Far Away Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb241aa46aa932c83fc62189536fffa14b851556.png)

Mew is found in the Faraway Ruin, a new rare structure that you can find in jungle biomes. Entering the Faraway Ruins will spawn in a level 30 Mew. Rarely in some structures you will find an Old Map, a map that leads you directly to the Faraway Ruins. Every player on the server will get only one chance to catch Mew. The Faraway Ruins are based on the Faraway Island from Gen III.

- Xerneas
![The Tree of Life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce9086a6fa59cc8e2b8163abd6f7531a5c2f947_0.webp)

Xerneas is found at the Tree of Life, a new rare structure that you can find in oak forest biomes. Getting near the Tree of Life will spawn in a level 50 Xerneas. Rarely in some structures you will find a Life Map, a map that leads you directly to the Tree of Life. Every player on the server will get only one chance to catch Xerneas. The Tree of Life is based on a location from Pokemon Mystery Dungeon.

- Legendary Birds

The Legendary Birds are roaming legendarys that will randomly spawn in any biome, but they are 3 times rarer than starter pokémon. Different weather conditions will affect how likly they are to spawn. Articuno spawns 2 times more often during the rain, Zapdos spawns 2 times more often during a storm, & Moltres spawns 2 times more often during clear weather.

- Walking Wake & Iron Leaves
![Iron Leaves & Walking Wake inside of there Tera Dens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d89ae710cf9d2fc9154809252e628ee4fdc5fe_0.webp)

Walking Wake & Iron Leaves are found at Tera Dens, a new set of underground structure that come in 2 types: Water Tera Dens, & Psychic Tera Dens. Getting near the center of a Tera Den will spawn in the respective legendary at level 75. Walking Wake in Water Dens, & Iron Leaves in Psychic Dens. Rarely in some structures you will find a Tera Map, a map that leads you directly to either Tera Den. Every player on the server will get only one chance to catch them.

Why these set of legendaries?
¯\\\_(ツ)_/¯
